chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P No. D- 2019 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Fresh Case. 1. For orders on Misc. No. 8041/2026 (U/A) 2. For order on office objection No. 1 to 3. 3. For order on Misc. No. 8042/2026 (Ex/App) 4. For order on Misc. No. 8043/2026 (Stay/App) 5. For hearing of main case. 02.04.2026. Mr. Shahan Jawahery, Advocate for the Petitioner. ********** 1. Granted. 2-5. The instant Petition has been filed, whereby the Petitioners have not challenged any order, but in fact are seeking interim orders against the Respondents, to restrain them from auctioning certain goods (in possession of the Respondents). However, the matter pertaining to such goods is already under Appeal before the Honourable Supreme Court, and therefore since the Petitioner is already before the appropriate forum, i.e. the Supreme Court of Pakistan, the writ jurisdiction of this Court cannot be invoked, and accordingly the instant Petition being not maintainable is dismissed in limine alongwith listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE AYAZ
